scope: ABB ISA W3C HMI evidence review
round 3 decision convergence, capacity/fill/comparison red-team review, and five design specifications
hard_limits: do not overwrite l4_showcase/src/样张_S3定稿.html
no next-version implementation before 3 rounds and 12 answers

negative_runs: first domain-filter attempt parsed a comma list as one invalid space-separated domain string
second attempt retrieved results but cp1252 could not write to the Chinese _通信 path
retry wrote to ASCII path F:/abb_wh_work/research/0716 successfully

post-write inline Python report-size probe received a Chinese filename mangled as question marks through PowerShell and raised WinError 123; JSON validation had already passed and the report was rechecked with PowerShell -LiteralPath

deep_research.method: bounded multi-source audit with source, evidence and claim ledgers
deep_research.skill_package_limitation: SKILL.md referenced reference/methodology.md, report-assembly.md and quality-gates.md, but those files were absent; fallback ledgers were used and the limitation is disclosed

independent_agents.role: algorithm formulas and trace export audit
experiment registry and three input modes audit
UI 3D and Factory I/O evidence-boundary critic

adjudication.reason: 20x20 logical SIM, 54-slot Factory I/O evidence, and unverified physical states are visually conflated

decisions.q9: canonical managed 0/267 to 267/267; total occupancy 133/400 to 400/400; quick checkpoints
decisions.q10: full continuous replay primary plus periodic/critical slow motion
decisions.q11: parallel 2D+3D lanes with shared external inputs and event barrier
decisions.q12: provisional 60-second click-next onboarding; re-ask after core UI

evidence_boundaries: 400/400 is a static capacity endpoint, not current continuous full-warehouse operating capability
267 is capacity, not a generic proven placement result for arbitrary cargo or strategy
AWRA-LS is offline batch information and is not a same-level online fairness lane
current S3 remains 120 inventory plus 100 paired cycles, single-seed representative replay
path, kgm energy and throughput are absent from current S3 stats and cannot be shown before export

independent_agents.role: five distinct information architecture and visual schemes

blocking_findings: new fill-only runner/schema required; existing paired trace cannot be cut or spliced
SCORE/AUTO 267-density online path requires a frozen, persisted zero-failure feasibility certificate
failed-domain throughput can be overstated by planned-operation numerator and must be N/A or actual-completion based
lap_optimal lacks complete-assignment guard for n greater than m
Python and ST accel=true scoring normalization are not yet proven source-equivalent
negative_runs: old agent handles returned not_found after thread compaction; three equivalent gpt-5.6-sol critics were respawned
direct apply_patch to F drive was blocked by Windows restricted-token sandbox
direct temporary apply_patch.bat and WindowsApps codex.exe execution returned access denied
first staged hunk parser used a regex that did not match a bare @@ marker; hash/content verification caught unchanged output and a corrected staged copy was produced
artifact copy completed but outer orchestration echo raised ReferenceError for undeclared rs; independent file/hash verification passed
